title: Assistant Store Manager - The Coffee Bean India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - The Coffee Bean India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India:
The Coffee Bean India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India!
